description: This file defines an API router for fetching the timeline of an asset, including importing dependencies, setting up a route, and defining the get_timeline function that retrieves chronological events related to a specific asset.

classes.name: TimelineEventOutMVP
classes.description: Schema used for serializing timeline event data in responses.

methods.name: list[TimelineEventOutMVP] get_timeline( asset_id: int = Path(..., description="Asset id."), limit: int = Query(200, ge=1, le=500, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Handles GET requests to fetch an asset's chronological timeline events, with optional limit parameter.

ctags.name: get_timeline
ctags.signature: ( asset_id: int = Path(..., description="Asset id."), limit: int = Query(200, ge=1, le=500, description="Max items."), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
